title: lactuca viminea subsp. chondrilliflora
intro: Lactuca viminea subsp. chondrilliflora, also known as lettuce-leaved fleabane, is a subspecies of the Lactuca viminea plant, a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lactuca viminea subsp. chondrilliflora include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
